name: postcss-helmlab

0.1.0.name: postcss-helmlab
0.1.0.description: PostCSS plugin to use Helmlab color spaces in CSS — helmlab(), helmlch(), helmgen(), helmgenlch() with fallback to rgb()

0.2.0.name: postcss-helmlab
0.2.0.description: PostCSS plugin to use Helmlab color spaces in CSS — helmlab(), helmlch(), helmgen(), helmgenlch() with rgb() fallback plus @supports-wrapped color(display-p3 …) and color(rec2020 …) overrides

0.2.1.name: postcss-helmlab
0.2.1.description: PostCSS plugin to use Helmlab color spaces in CSS — helmlab(), helmlch(), helmgen(), helmgenlch() with rgb() fallback plus @supports-wrapped color(display-p3 …) and color(rec2020 …) overrides

description: PostCSS plugin to use Helmlab color spaces in CSS — helmlab(), helmlch(), helmgen(), helmgenlch() with rgb() fallback plus @supports-wrapped color(display-p3 …) and color(rec2020 …) overrides
